data.title: Morphy's auction features 1,100 lots with notable items like OK Used Cars bullnose neon sign, Chevrolet Super Service neon sign, and Sinclair signs.
data.description: In Denver on October 2, 2025, over 1,100 lots will be up for auction. Among them are notable items such as an OK Used Cars bullnose neon sign, a Chevrolet Super Service neon sign, Sinclair signs featuring Aircraft Gasoline and Pennsylvania Motor Oil with the iconic 'Dino' mascot, a Mack bulldog, and a Tiger Gasoline globe lens. Collectors are expected to be enthusiastic about these rare finds.

data.title: Elevest Capital partners with Rise48 Equity to close Fund 61, acquiring 154-unit B+ multifamily community in Mesa, Arizona.
data.description: A real estate investment firm based in Scottsdale, Arizona, Elevest Capital, has recently finalized the closure of Fund 61 on October 2, 2025. This achievement was made possible in collaboration with Rise48 Equity and involved the procurement of a 154-unit Class B+ multifamily asset. Elevest Capital focuses on investments in the real estate sector, with a specialization in multifamily properties.

data.title: Global CDN market to reach $103.4 billion by 2035, growing at CAGR of 15.61% from $24.25 billion in 2025. Market analysis and key players listed.
data.description: A recent report titled "Content Delivery Network Market Industry Trends and Global Forecast to 2035" has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report projects that the global content delivery network market, valued at USD 24.25 billion in 2025, is expected to reach USD 103.4 billion by 2035. This represents a forecasted compound annual growth rate of 15.61% during the period spanning from 2025 to 2035. The market analysis includes segmentation by type of component, type of service provider, type of content, type of end user, and geographical regions.

data.title: Sonny's BBQ celebrates 10th anniversary of Pulled Pork Day with month of deals. 50% off sandwich on Oct 12. Chance to win prizes.
data.description: Celebrate National Pulled Pork Day this October with exciting deals lasting five weeks. Get 50% off a delicious Pulled Pork Sandwich on October 12. Additionally, discover new ultimate pulled pork utensils and participate to win amazing pork-filled prizes. The event is taking place in ORLANDO, Fla., starting from October 2.

data.title: Ontogen Medtech in Lisle earns ISO 13485 certification, boosting contract manufacturing. Oct 2, 2025. ISO 13485:2016 is the quality management standard.
data.description: A significant milestone has been reached by Ontogen Medtech, a prominent company based in LISLE, Ill., on Oct. 2, 2025. The company specializes in offering design and manufacturing services for medical devices and has successfully obtained the ISO 13485:2016 certification. This certification is a globally accepted standard for quality management in the medical device industry, underlining Ontogen Medtech's commitment to excellence in their operations. This achievement demonstrates their adherence to stringent quality standards, ensuring the delivery of high-quality products to their clientele.

data.title: Incline Equity Partners sells Charter Industries, a supplier of edgebanding, in middle market deal.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, Incline Equity Partners, a prominent private equity firm focusing on investments in the middle market, successfully completed the sale of Charter Industries. Charter Industries, a company specializing in providing edgebanding solutions, was the subject of this transaction.

data.title: Cymat completes $1.5M private placement financing, generating $1,499,500.
data.description: In Mississauga, Ontario, on October 2, 2025, Cymat Technologies Ltd. (TSXV: CYM) (OTCQB: CYMHF) finalized a non-brokered private placement of equity Units, known as the "Offering," raising $1,499,500 in total gross proceeds. Each Unit...

data.title: Joliet fire at Beep LLC/Diga-Talk+ site on Sept 20, 2025 prompts relocation. Operations resume at new facility.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, in Joliet, Illinois, a prominent company named Beep LLC/Diga-Talk+ that specializes in mobile radio and telecommunications solutions, encountered a major fire incident at its former site on West Jefferson Street. The fire broke out on September 20, 2025, during the early hours.

data.title: Digital Realty and DXC collaborating to accelerate global adoption of enterprise AI infrastructure at scale.
data.description: Digital Realty, a prominent global provider of carrier-neutral data center services, is expediting the planning and execution of private Artificial Intelligence infrastructure on a large scale through a strategic technology partnership. This initiative, announced in Dallas on October 2, 2025, aims to leverage cutting-edge technologies to enhance the company's capabilities in the field. As a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol DLR, Digital Realty is committed to revolutionizing AI infrastructure to meet the growing demand for innovative solutions.

data.title: Bitcoin reaches 2-month high at $118,000, Ethereum at $4,382.63, XRP at $2.99, Dogecoin at $0.2579. Over $357M traders liquidated in 24 hrs. $675.8M inflows into Bitcoin ETFs.
data.description: Bitcoin's value has surged to reach its highest point in two months, surpassing $118,000 on Thursday morning. The current cryptocurrency ticker prices are as follows: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) at $118,705.11, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) at $4,382.63, Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) at $225.07, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) at $2.99, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) at $0.2579, and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) at $0.00001261. Notable statistics reveal that 106,691 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, totaling $357.41 million in losses. Data from SoSoValue indicates a net inflow of $675.8 million into spot Bitcoin ETFs on Wednesday, with spot Ethereum ETFs seeing net inflows of $80.8 million. Trader insights from Daan Crypto Trades highlight the historical strength observed in October, while cautioning against relying solely on seasonality trends. For a detailed report, refer to the full story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bollinger signs deal with Ariel Fleet Holdings for 34 EVs for FedEx ISPs in NC and VA.
data.description: A total of 34 electric vehicles (30 Class 3 and 4 Class 1) will be provided by Ariel Fleet Holdings to Advanced Logistics Systems and Springbok Holdings, independent service providers for FedEx Corporation. These electric vehicles will be deployed in North Carolina and Virginia.

data.title: Sustainable Green Team, Ltd. plans debt reduction, returns over 18% of stock - enhancing shareholder value.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida on October 2, 2025, Sustainable Green Team, Ltd. (OTC: SGTM), a prominent provider of eco-friendly products, disclosed a restructuring strategy designed to lower debt and improve shareholder worth. This plan underscores the company's dedication to investors and its objective to strengthen the capital structure amidst a dynamic market environment.

data.title: Autonomix Medical's CEO discusses recent advancements with longer-term analysis and US trials set to start in 2026.
data.description: Autonomix Medical, Inc., based in The Woodlands, TX, and listed on NASDAQ as AMIX, has released information about their latest CEO Corner segment. CEO Brad Hauser delves into details about the Company's extended post hoc analysis from their initial proof-of-concept study, PoC 1, along with advancements towards launching U.S. clinical trials set to commence smoothly in 2026. This significant step forward in their pursuit of enhancing precision nerve-targeted treatments marks a pivotal moment for Autonomix and signifies a positive trajectory for the company's growth in the medical device sector.

data.title: Rock Tech & ArcelorMittal signed intent letter to boost regional industrial competence in East Brandenburg. Focus on skilled workers & lab services.
data.description: Rock Tech Guben GmbH and ArcelorMittal Eisenhüttenstadt GmbH have agreed to enhance regional partnerships in East Brandenburg by signing a letter of intent. The collaboration will primarily concentrate on workforce development and training, along with cooperative initiatives in laboratory functions.

data.title: CISOs Connect™ opens nominations for 2026 C100 Awards, honoring top 100 CISOs globally. Board of judges expands.
data.description: A prestigious award has been introduced to commend security chiefs who have established exceptional standards in the industry. CISOs Connect™, a worldwide coalition of CISOs and prominent security executives, has commenced the nomination process for the 2026 CISOs Top 100 (C100) Awards in New York on October 2, 2025. The award aims to acknowledge the innovative efforts of chief information security officers and other top security personnel who excel in their roles. This annual event seeks to honor the top 100 CISOs who have significantly contributed to the field, celebrating their achievements and setting a benchmark for excellence in the industry.

data.title: Tineco offers cleaning tips and deals to prep homes for fall festivities in Seattle; article published on Oct 2, 2025.
data.description: With the arrival of autumn, households are encountering common seasonal issues such as dirty entryways, dusty corners, and carpets that require cleaning. To address these concerns, exclusive product promotions and practical cleaning advice are being offered to assist in keeping homes fresh, cozy, and prepared for guests. The initiative is available in Seattle starting from October 2, 2025. These resources aim to help households maintain cleanliness during the fall season, with specific focus on addressing muddy floors and dusty areas. Residents can take advantage of special deals on cleaning products to ensure their homes are welcoming and well-maintained.
